rationale: Confirmed deadly Russian strikes on Kyiv killing nine and destroying a historic cathedral represent a direct qualitative escalation in the war; simultaneously the US-Iran peace deal raises concern about Western attention and resources being diverted from Ukraine.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Confirmed Russian strikes on Kyiv killed nine civilians and destroyed a historic cathedral — a direct, qualitative escalation in the war affecting Ukrainian residents' safety and morale.

top_events.title: US-Iran to sign a 'peace deal' on Friday: What we know / World reacts as Iran and US reach deal
top_events.summary: A confirmed US-Iran peace deal announcement risks diverting US diplomatic and political attention away from Ukraine support, a significant concern for Ukrainian residents dependent on Western aid.

top_events.title: Lebanese remain sceptical despite US-Iran ceasefire announcement
top_events.summary: Regional scepticism about the US-Iran deal's durability is noted; for Ukraine, a fragile deal that keeps US attention on the Middle East is a continued concern rather than relief.
